title: Lebron james as a goat
description: Yep, a resource pack turning Lebonbon to a minecraft goat, strange no one made that before.
body:
This is quite literally just a resource pack that turns the minecraft goat into lebron james, it's somewhat badly drawn but it's alright. I've searched and literally no one else made this.

( Shoutout to the [Lebron totem mod](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/letotem) if you want more lebron.)
